yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Russialinked_hackers_target_Signal_Whats {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Russia-linked hackers target Signal, WhatsApp of officials globally"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WhatsApp" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Malicious_npm_Package_Posing_as_OpenClaw {
    meta:

        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-27689 - Denial of service (DOS) in SAP Supply Chain"; content:"CVE-2026-27689"; nocase; sid:6141323; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 15 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 6 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-29, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
